label: SAP S/4HANA
note: ERP system of record — finished-goods & raw-material planning, all master data.

label: Kinaxis
note: Demand & supply planning; inventory pre-builds. Aera skills write optimized plans back here.

label: PlanX
note: Commercial / operations planning system — carries the commercial demand signal that is reconciled against Kinaxis supply planning.

label: Snowflake / Databricks
note: Consolidated data platform — captures transactional data from S4 and Kinaxis; the single source skills & agents read.

label: Point-of-Sale (POS) scans
note: Retail scan data — mapped up from scans to cases for sell-through visibility at the shelf.

label: Retailer / customer EDI · shelf & warehouse
note: Distributor/customer orders, shelf and warehouse positions — drives on-shelf availability and service levels.

label: Syndicated market data
note: External market/category data for like-product benchmarks and demand potential.

label: Like-product library
note: Internal historical analog library — powers NPI forecasting where the new product has no own history.

label: Digital / unstructured signals
note: Web, social and other unstructured early-demand signals, extracted via GenAI.
